"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-347", "name": "Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature"}], "description": "### Impact
The staking contract accepts `UpdateValidator` transactions that set `new_voting_key=Some(...)` while omitting `new_proof_of_knowledge`. this skips the proof-of-knowledge requirement that is needed to prevent BLS rogue-key attacks when public keys are aggregated.

Because tendermint macro block justification verification aggregates validator voting keys and verifies a single aggregated BLS signature against that aggregate public key, a rogue-key voting key in the validator set can allow an attacker to forge a quorum-looking justification while only producing a single signature.

While the impact is critical, the exploitability is low: The voting keys are fixed for the epoch, so the attacker would need to know the next epoch validator set (chosen through VRF), which is unlikely.

### Patches
[The patch for this vulnerability](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/e7f0ab7d2115e17d6e5548ddc60f10df1a5d645f) is included as part of [v1.3.0](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0).

### Workarounds
No known workarounds.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00201, "percentile": 0.09999}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pf4j-pf3w-95f9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T19:22:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pf4j-pf3w-95f9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pf4j-pf3w-95f9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34068"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T21:17:08Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T19:22:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-pf4j-pf3w-95f9", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3654", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/e7f0ab7d2115e17d6e5548ddc60f10df1a5d645f", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34068", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pf4j-pf3w-95f9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-pf4j-pf3w-95f9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-transaction: UpdateValidator transactions allows voting key change without proof-of-knowledge", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:22:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pf4j-pf3w-95f9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-transaction"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-transaction: UpdateValidator transactions allows voting key change without proof-of-knowledge
